subcodes.first_line: The Book speaketh the truth from the presence of Him Who hath arisen to the Cause of God with a sovereignty that no intimations of those who [oppose] can withhold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینطق بالحق من لدن من قام علی امر الله بسلطان لمن تمنعه اشارات الذین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation
